groups.resolution: One global router. Plugin routers are scoped to explicit plugin workflows; Addy's router is excluded.
Use curated tdd by default. Superpowers is scoped to an explicit Superpowers workflow; Addy is merged, not installed.
Use diagnose by default; Superpowers is explicitly scoped; Addy is merged, not installed.
Review owns general change review; requesting-code-review owns the request stage; security-diff-scan owns security only; Addy is merged.
Writing-plans owns implementation planning; to-issues publishes work; request-refactor-plan is refactor-specific; Addy is merged.
